memoryArtifacts.headline: Erik Glipping (Klipping), o. 1249-1286, king
memoryArtifacts.description: Erik Glipping (Klipping), o.1249-1286, King, was born on Laaland, while his father, Christoffer (I), was endowed with this island; his mother was Margrethe, the daughter of the Pomeranian Duke Sambor. …

memoryArtifacts.headline: da.Wikipedia Erik Klipping
memoryArtifacts.description: Erik Klipping (født 1249 på Lolland, myrdet 22. november 1286 i Finderup), også kendt som Erik 5. eller Erik Glipping, var en dansk konge fra 1259 til 1286. Han var søn af kong Christoffer 1. og dronn …

zh.Roskilde, Western Pomerania, Holy Roman: 丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根
zh.Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany: 德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫藍德可萊斯 羅斯托克
zh.Ålholm Slot, Lolland, Denmark: 丹麥馬利波凡托雷奧爾霍爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eric V of Denmark於大約1249年出生在丹麥馬利波凡托雷奧爾霍爾姆時，他的父親Christopher I of Denmark31歲，母親Margaret Sambiria17歲。他於大約1273年與Agnes of Brandenburg在瑞典結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年11月22日在丹麥哈爾德分德盧普享年38歲，埋葬在丹麥維波格。

zh-hans.Ålholm Slot, Lolland, Denmark: 丹麦馬利波凡托雷奧爾霍爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eric V of Denmark于大约1249年出生在丹麦馬利波凡托雷奧爾霍爾姆时，他的父亲Christopher I of Denmark31岁，母亲Margaret Sambiria17岁。他于大约1273年与Agnes of Brandenburg在瑞典结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年11月22日在丹麦哈爾德分德盧普享年38岁，埋葬在丹麦維波格。

nameMeanings.name: Eric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

variants.name: Erick
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

variants.name: Erik
meanings: Later variant of   Eirik  , now in frequent use, especially in Sweden.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Denmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

en.lifeSummary: When Eric V of Denmark was born about 1249, in Ålholm, Vantore, Maribo, Denmark, his father, Christopher I of Denmark, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Sambiria, was 17. He married Agnes of Brandenburg about 1273, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 22 November 1286, in Finderup, Hald, Denmark, at the age of 38, and was buried in Viborg, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eric V of Denmark est né environ 1249, à Ålholm, Vantore, Maribo, Danemark, son père, Christopher I of Denmark, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sambiria, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Agnes of Brandenburg environ 1273, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1286, à Finderup, Hald, Danemark, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Viborg, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eric V of Denmark um 1249 in Ålholm, Vantore, Maribo, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher I of Denmark 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Sambiria 17. Er hat um 1273 in Schweden Agnes of Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. November 1286 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Finderup, Hald, Dänemark und wurde in Viborg, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eric V of Denmark è nato il circa 1249 nel Ålholm, Vantore, Maribo, Danimarca, il suo padre, Christopher I of Denmark, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Sambiria, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Agnes of Brandenburg circa 1273, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1286, nel Finderup, Hald, Danimarca, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Viborg, Danimarca.

ja.Finderup Lade, Viborg, Denmark: デンマークハルドフィンデルップ
ja.Roskilde, Danmark: デンマークロスキルド

ja.Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany: ドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンランドクレイス ロストック
ja.Roskilde, Denmark: デンマークロスキルド
ja.Ålholm Slot, Lolland, Denmark: デンマークマリボヴァントーアaルhオルム
ja.lifeSummary: Eric V of Denmarkが約1249年にデンマークマリボヴァントーアaルhオルムで生まれた時，父Christopher I of Denmarkは31歳，母Margaret Sambiriaは17歳であった。約1273年にスウェーデンでAgnes of Brandenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年11月22日にデンマークハルドフィンデルップで38歳で死去し，デンマークヴィボルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eric V of Denmark(이)가 대략 1249년 덴마크 마이보 버토어 a홀름에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher I of Denmark(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Sambiria(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1273년 스웨덴에서 Agnes of Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 11월 22일 덴마크 할드 핑더업에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 비볼그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eric V of Denmark nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Ålholm, Vantore, Maribo, Dinamarca, seu pai, Christopher I of Denmark, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sambiria, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes of Brandenburg aproximadamente 1273, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1286, em Finderup, Hald, Dinamarca, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Viborg, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eric V of Denmark родился около 1249 г. в местности aлхолм, вантор, марибо, Дания, его отцу по имени Christopher I of Denmark было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sambiria, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes of Brandenburg около 1273 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 22 ноября 1286 г. в местности финдируп, хэлд, Дания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности виборг, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eric V of Denmark nació aproximadamente 1249, en Ålholm, Vantore, Maribo, Dinamarca, su papá, Christopher I of Denmark, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Sambiria, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Agnes of Brandenburg aproximadamente 1273, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1286, en Finderup, Hald, Dinamarca, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Viborg, Dinamarca.
